summary: Anonymous user ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is not logged in
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is archived

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND the following title text displays, "Subscription Required" (driven by content restrictions)
AND the following description text displays, "A subscription is needed to watch this game." (driven by content restrictions)
AND the following title text displays, "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade Plan] button displays below "Full Game Access"
AND the user is taken to the paywall/subscriptions page after selecting the [Upgrade Plan] button
